CLAIM COORDINATION

Insurance & Cashless TPAs

Cashless hospitalization settlements supporting leading private corporate insurance policies and government health schemes.

Hassle-Free Cashless Claims

Our dedicated insurance desk handles all document processing, claim submissions, and TPA clearances directly. You can focus entirely on your recovery while we settle your bills with your provider.

Private Insurance

Compatible with Star Health, Niva Bupa, HDFC Ergo, ICICI Lombard, and all major corporate insurance networks.

Government Schemes

Aarogyasri Health Cards and central/state government healthcare program integrations for eligible citizens.

Corporate Empanelments

Empaneled with major regional corporate groups, public sector undertakings, and administrative boards.

PALLAWI HOSPITAL

Exceptional orthopedic care, children's services, and critical care units in Mancherial, Telangana. Blending clinical brilliance with genuine compassion.
